meaning: adj.起风暴的,天气愈变愈坏的,可怕的
examples: The competitors had to contend with squally weather conditions.
Squally thunderstorms within a squall line.
Rain will be heavy at times with a few squally thunderstorms.
Squally weather may continue over North Bay and coastal regions of Bangladesh, it said.
The soundtrack is full of ersatz British pop, so tuneless and squally that it could almost be the real thing.
